description: 间隔重复推送（Spaced Repetition）— 基于 SM-2 算法，在用户最容易遗忘的时间点推送旧笔记，支持独立回顾页面、飞书/Meow 推送及站内通知

userStories.title: 数据库 — 创建 SR 卡片表和规则表
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to store spaced repetition card state and filter rules in MySQL so the system can track review schedules.
acceptanceCriteria: 在 apps/server/src/db/schema/ 创建 spacedRepetitionCards 表，字段：cardId VARCHAR(191) PK、userId VARCHAR(191)、memoId VARCHAR(191)、easeFactor FLOAT DEFAULT 2.5、interval INT DEFAULT 1、repetitions INT DEFAULT 0、nextReviewAt TIMESTAMP、lastReviewAt TIMESTAMP NULL、createdAt TIMESTAMP

在 apps/server/src/db/schema/ 创建 spacedRepetitionRules 表，字段：ruleId VARCHAR(191) PK、userId VARCHAR(191)、mode ENUM('include','exclude')、filterType ENUM('category','tag')、filterValue VARCHAR(255)、createdAt TIMESTAMP
两张表均从 apps/server/src/db/schema/index.ts 导出
cd apps/server && pnpm build && pnpm migrate:generate 执行无报错，生成迁移文件
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 数据库 — 用户设置表新增 SR 配置字段
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to store per-user spaced repetition settings (enabled flag and daily limit) in the database.
acceptanceCriteria: 在现有用户设置表（users 表或 user_settings 表，以实际代码为准）新增字段：srEnabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT false、srDailyLimit INT DEFAULT 5
cd apps/server && pnpm build && pnpm migrate:generate 执行无报错，生成迁移文件
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 后端 — SM-2 算法服务（含单元测试）
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a service that implements the SM-2 algorithm to calculate the next review interval based on user feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: 创建 apps/server/src/services/spaced-repetition.service.ts，实现 SpacedRepetitionService（@Service() 装饰）
实现方法 calculateNextReview(card, quality: 1|3|4|5): { easeFactor, interval, repetitions, nextReviewAt }
quality=5 (mastered): easeFactor = max(1.3, EF + 0.15), repetitions++, interval = round(prevInterval * EF * 1.3)
quality=4 (remembered): easeFactor = max(1.3, EF + 0.1), repetitions++, interval = round(prevInterval * EF)
quality=3 (fuzzy): easeFactor = max(1.3, EF - 0.08), repetitions++, interval = round(prevInterval * max(1.3, EF - 0.08))
quality=1 (forgot): easeFactor = max(1.3, EF - 0.2), repetitions=0, interval=1
interval 特殊规则：repetitions 重置后第一次=1天，第二次=6天，之后按公式增长
nextReviewAt = 当前时间 + interval 天
单元测试文件覆盖四种 quality 的输入输出，Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 后端 — SR 卡片创建、重新评估、级联删除逻辑
userStories.description: As a developer, I need card lifecycle management: auto-create on memo create, re-evaluate on memo update, cascade delete on memo delete.
acceptanceCriteria: 在 SpacedRepetitionService 中实现 createCardIfEligible(userId, memoId)：检查过滤规则（exclude 优先于 include，无规则时全部加入），符合条件则创建卡片，初始值 easeFactor=2.5, interval=1, repetitions=0, nextReviewAt=明天08:00；同一 memoId 不重复创建
在 SpacedRepetitionService 中实现 reevaluateCard(userId, memoId)：重新判断过滤规则，应加入且卡片不存在则创建，不应加入且卡片存在则删除，应加入且已存在则不操作
在 MemoService.createMemo() 完成后调用 createCardIfEligible
在 MemoService.updateMemo() 完成后，若 categoryId 或 tags 变化则调用 reevaluateCard
在 MemoService.deleteMemo() 中删除 Memo 前删除对应 spaced_repetition_cards 记录（按 memoId），即使无对应卡片也不报错
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 后端 — SR 设置和过滤规则 API
userStories.description: As a user, I want to configure my spaced repetition settings and filter rules via API so the frontend can persist my preferences.
acceptanceCriteria: 创建 apps/server/src/controllers/v1/spaced-repetition.controller.ts
GET /api/v1/spaced-repetition/settings 返回当前用户 srEnabled、srDailyLimit（需 JWT 认证）
PUT /api/v1/spaced-repetition/settings 更新 srEnabled 和 srDailyLimit（需 JWT 认证）
GET /api/v1/spaced-repetition/rules 返回当前用户过滤规则列表（需 JWT 认证）
POST /api/v1/spaced-repetition/rules 创建规则，body: { mode: 'include'|'exclude', filterType: 'category'|'tag', filterValue: string }（需 JWT 认证）
DELETE /api/v1/spaced-repetition/rules/:ruleId 删除规则，规则不属于当前用户时返回 404（需 JWT 认证）
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 后端 — 回顾 API（获取待复习列表 + 提交掌握程度）
userStories.description: As a user, I want to fetch due cards and submit review results so the review page can function.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/v1/spaced-repetition/due 返回当前用户 nextReviewAt <= now 的卡片列表，含 Memo 信息（id, title, content 前200字），按 nextReviewAt 升序，需 JWT 认证
返回格式：{ cards: Array<{ cardId, memoId, memo: { id, title, content }, easeFactor, interval, repetitions, nextReviewAt }> }
POST /api/v1/spaced-repetition/cards/:cardId/review 接受 body { quality: 'mastered'|'remembered'|'fuzzy'|'forgot'|'skip' }，需 JWT 认证
quality 映射：mastered→5, remembered→4, fuzzy→3, forgot→1；skip 不更新卡片状态，直接返回当前卡片
非 skip 时调用 SM-2 算法更新 easeFactor, interval, repetitions, nextReviewAt, lastReviewAt
卡片不存在或不属于当前用户时返回 404
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 数据库 — 创建站内通知表
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to store in-app notifications in MySQL so users can see review reminders without external push channels.
acceptanceCriteria: 在 apps/server/src/db/schema/ 创建 inAppNotifications 表，字段：notificationId VARCHAR(191) PK、userId VARCHAR(191)、type VARCHAR(50)、title VARCHAR(255)、body TEXT、memoId VARCHAR(191) NULL、isRead BOOLEAN DEFAULT false、createdAt TIMESTAMP
从 apps/server/src/db/schema/index.ts 导出
cd apps/server && pnpm build && pnpm migrate:generate 执行无报错
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 后端 — 站内通知 API（列表 + 标记已读）
userStories.description: As a user, I want to fetch and mark in-app notifications so I can manage my review reminders.
acceptanceCriteria: 创建 apps/server/src/controllers/v1/notification.controller.ts
GET /api/v1/notifications 返回当前用户通知列表（最近 50 条，按 createdAt 降序），需 JWT 认证
POST /api/v1/notifications/:id/read 将指定通知标记为已读，通知不属于当前用户时返回 404，需 JWT 认证
GET /api/v1/notifications/unread-count 返回当前用户未读通知数量 { count: number }，需 JWT 认证
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 后端 — 定时推送任务（每日 08:00）
userStories.description: As a user, I want to receive daily push notifications for due cards so I'm reminded to review.
acceptanceCriteria: 在 SchedulerService 中注册每日 08:00 的 cron 任务 sendSpacedRepetitionPush
任务查询所有 srEnabled=true 用户中 nextReviewAt <= now 的卡片，按 userId 分组，每用户取最多 srDailyLimit 条
对每个用户：若已配置外部推送渠道（飞书/Meow），通过 ChannelFactory 发送推送
推送内容格式：📚 复习提醒：《{memo.title}》\n{memo.content前100字}\n查看笔记：{站内链接}
同时将推送内容写入 in_app_notifications 表（type='spaced_repetition'）
未开启 SR（srEnabled=false）的用户跳过
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 前端 — Settings 页面 SR 配置区块
userStories.description: As a user, I want to enable/disable spaced repetition and configure daily limit and filter rules in Settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings 页面新增「间隔重复」区块，包含：开启/关闭 toggle、每日最大推送数量输入框（1-20，默认5）
开关关闭时，其他设置项显示为 disabled
toggle 和数量输入框变更后自动调用 PUT /api/v1/spaced-repetition/settings 保存
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 前端 — Settings 页面过滤规则管理
userStories.description: As a user, I want to add and remove include/exclude filter rules for spaced repetition in Settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings SR 区块内显示现有过滤规则列表，每条规则显示 [include/exclude] [category/tag]: value，支持删除按钮
删除规则时弹出确认 dialog，确认后调用 DELETE /api/v1/spaced-repetition/rules/:ruleId，列表实时更新
提供添加规则表单：下拉选 include/exclude、下拉选 category/tag、输入具体值，提交后调用 POST /api/v1/spaced-repetition/rules，列表实时更新
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 前端 — 回顾页面 /review
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dedicated review page that shows me due cards one by one so I can efficiently go through my spaced repetition queue.
acceptanceCriteria: 路由 /review 对应独立回顾页面，需登录
页面加载时请求 GET /api/v1/spaced-repetition/due，展示待复习卡片总数和进度条（第X张/共Y张）
逐卡展示：显示 Memo 标题 + 内容前200字
每张卡片底部有五个操作按钮（左到右）：跳过（灰）| 忘记了（红）/ 模糊（黄）/ 记住了（绿）/ 熟练掌握（深蓝紫）
点击任意操作调用 POST /api/v1/spaced-repetition/cards/:cardId/review，自动切换到下一张
跳过的卡片移至本次队列末尾；若本轮所有剩余卡片均被跳过则结束
所有卡片处理完毕后显示完成状态「今日复习完成 🎉」
无待复习卡片时显示空状态「今天没有需要复习的笔记」
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in apps/web/src/pages/review/index.tsx - added SR mode selector and 5-button review interface

userStories.title: 前端 — 导航栏站内通知入口
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see in-app notifications for review reminders in the nav bar so I can access them without external push channels.
acceptanceCriteria: 导航栏新增通知图标（铃铛），有未读通知时图标上显示红点
点击图标展开通知下拉列表（最近50条），每条显示标题、时间、已读/未读状态
点击通知项跳转到对应 Memo 或 /review 页面，并调用 POST /api/v1/notifications/:id/read 标记已读
页面加载及每60秒（或 visibilitychange 时）调用 GET /api/v1/notifications/unread-count 刷新未读数
Typecheck passes
